title: I Parry a Cow
overview: If young Noor wants to leave his simple farm life and become an adventurer, he's going to need to learn some skills!

title: I Parry the Reward
overview: After Noor takes out a vicious demon, the likes of which folks have never seen, he is reluctant to take credit. However, Lynne, the girl Noor saved, seeks him out.

title: I Parry Taking On A Page
overview: Noor may be exhausted, but he never gives up. When Gilbert invites him for a mock battle, Noor simply can’t resist the practice for a budding adventurer like himself.

title: I Parry a Goblin
overview: The more Noor tries to clear up an understanding, the more complicated the situation gets! Meanwhile, Rein plots to use Noor as a future secret weapon.

title: I Parry a Frog
overview: Noor and Rein encounter a vicious monster and a mysterious boy that appear in the royal capital of Crays Kingdom.

title: I Parry Deadly Poison
overview: The boy that Noor saved was born a "demon" with the power to control monsters. Noor sees past that and recognizes his talents, but another threat lurks around the corner.

title: I Parry the Dead
overview: A dead man who was once an S-rank adventurer has become a vicious murderer. Meanwhile, a threat on a scale beyond human comprehension appears in the sky above the capital.

title: I Parry the Dragon
overview: Noor steps in to face the dragon that appears over the royal capital. A fierce battle unfolds; it’s time to parry every attack!

title: I Parry an Army
overview: The army of a foreign empire, which signed a non-aggression pact with the Crays Kingdom, finally begins its invasion. Standing in its way: Noor!

title: I Parry the Emperor's Authority
overview: Noor and his team take on a battle that will decide the future of the Crays Kingdom.

title: I Parry Divine Wrath
overview: Noor must use all his strength to parry his toughest challenge yet: a beam of magical light!

title: I Parry Everything
overview: After the battle for Crays Kingdom is over, Noor is busy cleaning away the debris. Amid the rubble, he finds something that makes his childhood days come back to him.
